name: Rotate a LL
category: Learn LinkedList [Single LL, Double LL, Medium, Hard Problems]
statement: Given the head of a singly linked list containing integers, shift the elements of the linked list to the right by k places and return the head of the modified list. Do not change the values of the nodes, only change the links between nodes.
constraints:
• 0 <= number of nodes in the linked list <= 105
  • -104 <= ListNode.val <= 104
  • 0 <= k <= 5 * 105
  • k may have values greater than number of nodes in the linked list.

examples.explanation: List after 1 shift to right: head -> 5 -> 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4. List after 2 shift to right: head -> 4 -> 5 -> 1 -> 2 -> 3.

List after 1 shift to right: head -> 5 -> 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4. List after 2 shift to right: head -> 4 -> 5 -> 1 -> 2 -> 3. List after 3 shift to right: head -> 3 -> 4 -> 5 -> 1 -> 2. List after 4 shift to right: head -> 2 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5 -> 1.
